testcase.name: test_create_barter_post_with_all_fields

failure.message: AssertionError: Created post should appear in feed assert '69cfd3d9ac01849897a257dd' in ['69cb12a7ad8898386422d85d', '69cb12a7ad8898386422d85e', '69c82b074a1b2049579b7637', '69c82b074a1b2049579b7638', '69cee5195983a5a8354efa4e', '69cee5a72ae6c3e064286fbe', ...] + where '69cfd3d9ac01849897a257dd' = <test_non_admin_posting.TestNonAdminBarterPost object at 0xf9b5b49fc290>.created_post_id

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_non_admin_posting.py:62: in test_create_barter_post_with_all_fields assert self.created_post_id in post_ids, "Created post should appear in feed" E AssertionError: Created post should appear in feed E assert '69cfd3d9ac01849897a257dd' in ['69cb12a7ad8898386422d85d', '69cb12a7ad8898386422d85e', '69c82b074a1b2049579b7637', '69c82b074a1b2049579b7638', '69cee5195983a5a8354efa4e', '69cee5a72ae6c3e064286fbe', ...] E + where '69cfd3d9ac01849897a257dd' = <test_non_admin_posting.TestNonAdminBarterPost object at 0xf9b5b49fc290>.created_post_id

testcase.name: test_barter_post_validation_title_required

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected validation error, got 201 assert 201 in [400, 422] + where 201 = <Response [201]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_non_admin_posting.py:175: in test_barter_post_validation_title_required assert res.status_code in [400, 422], f"Expected validation error, got {res.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected validation error, got 201 E assert 201 in [400, 422] E + where 201 = <Response [201]>.status_code
